prestazioni: Replace the original Tornado 230 (3.8L I6) engine with a **Ford 300 inline-six (240/300ci) stroked to 4.9L** using a **SCAT Enterprises 4.00" crankshaft**, **Manley forged H-beam connecting rods**, and **JE Pistons 9.5:1 forged slugs** for a naturally aspirated 300+ hp build. Pair with a **Holley Sniper EFI throttle-body injection system** and a **MSD 6AL ignition box** for precise fuel and spark control.

Install a **Tremec TKO-600 5-speed manual transmission** with a **McLeod twin-disc clutch (MRT-10310)** and a **QuickTime SFI-certified bellhousing** to handle the increased torque. Use a **Currie Enterprises 9" nodular iron rear end** with **3.73:1 gears**, **ARB Air Locker**, and **Strange Engineering 35-spline axles** for off-road durability and on-road grip.

Upgrade the suspension with **King Shocks 2.5" Remote Reservoir Coilovers (8" travel)** front and rear, paired with **Poly Performance heavy-duty leaf springs (1,500 lb capacity)** and **Currie Antirock sway bars**. Fit **Nitto Trail Grappler 37x12.5R17 tires** on **Method MR701 beadlock wheels** for maximum traction and articulation.
estetica: Fabricate a **custom steel tube front bumper** with integrated **WARN Zeon 12-S winch** and **PIAA 520 LED light pods**, replacing the stock military bumper for a tactical yet aggressive stance.

Install a **Rocket Bunny M715 widebody kit** (custom-fabricated for this model) with **carbon fiber fender flares**, **aluminum rock sliders**, and a **rear steel tubbed bed** to accommodate the 37" tires while maintaining a vintage military aesthetic.

Apply a **custom two-tone matte olive drab and flat black paint scheme** using **PPG DP90LF military-grade epoxy primer** and **Sherwin-Williams M9352 topcoat**, paired with **3M Scotchlite reflective vinyl stripes** for a functional, high-visibility look. Replace all exterior hardware with **ARP stainless steel bolts** and **Dzus fasteners** for a clean, tool-free removal setup.
